query:
INSERT INTO questions (questionId, text, type, sectionId) VALUES 
('orders-workflow_config', 'Orders Workflow Configuration', 'workflow', 'orders-workflow'),
('images-workflow_config', 'Images Workflow Configuration', 'workflow', 'images-workflow'),
('priors-workflow_config', 'Priors Workflow Configuration', 'workflow', 'priors-workflow'),
('reports-workflow_config', 'Reports Out Workflow Configuration', 'workflow', 'reports-workflow')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE text=VALUES(text);
